Hook: Fluency Trap — calculus student accepts wrong answer because AI sounded so sure
CoreMessage: AI makes you accept wrong answers because it sounds fluent and confident
Notes_Gemini: Best performer. Fluency Trap lane resonates. Hook is concrete and identity-specific (student).
Decision: Council: Scale candidate. Fluency Trap replicated finding across 2+ videos confirms lane. No conversion data yet.
column29: Scale — same hook angle. Film new version doubling down on student identity. Add /shape CTA on screen.

ContentTitle: LLMs Are Persuasive Even When Guessing — HUD Demo
Hook: LLMs are persuasive even when guessing — Fluency Illusion in action
CoreMessage: AI is persuasive when it's guessing. FoldSpace shows the HUD shift.
Notes_Gemini: Strong views — second best. Product HUD demo. Low engagement (0 likes). Hook works; product reveal may lose interest.
Decision: Watch the drop-off point. If retention tanks when HUD appears the hook is working but the product transition needs work.
column29: Repeat — try same concept with faster cut to product demo. Split test hook-only vs hook+demo format.

Hook: AI tells you what you want to hear — FoldSpace v2.22 is live
CoreMessage: AI tells you what you want to hear. FoldSpace v2.22 catches that.
Notes_Gemini: Third-best. 3 likes = resonance. Sycophancy framing landed. Release news tacked on may dilute the problem hook.
Decision: Sycophancy is a strong lane — try a version without the product launch angle to isolate framing performance.
column29: Repeat — film pure sycophancy video without release tie-in. Keep product reveal for a separate cut.

Hook: Student copies AI output without checking — Fluency Trap at school scale
CoreMessage: Students copy AI output without noticing the errors — Fluency Trap at school scale
Notes_Gemini: 1 comment despite low likes. Fluency Trap student lane again — comment suggests it landed emotionally for someone.
Decision: Comment engagement on low-view videos often means wrong audience reached. Check who commented — is it a student or a teacher?
column29: Remix — refilm with student identity front-and-center. Show the moment of catching the error on screen, not just describing it.

ContentTitle: Passive Mode — You Become a Passenger
Hook: Passive Mode — you become a passenger in your own thinking
CoreMessage: Don't become a passenger in your own thinking. The orb shifts when you go passive.
Notes_Gemini: Product Passive Mode demo. Zero engagement metrics. Transformation hook may be too soft. Orb shift not visible enough.
Decision: Transformation lane ("don't become X") works better when the before/after is visceral. Abstract orb shift needs visual proof.
column29: Repeat — show the orb actually shifting on screen. Make passive state visually obvious. Add on-screen text callout.

ContentTitle: FoldSpace v2.22 Store Submission — Hugo Orb Live
Hook: FoldSpace v2.22 with Hugo Orb is live on Chrome and Edge
CoreMessage: FoldSpace v2.22 with Hugo Orb is now live on Chrome and Edge.
Notes_Gemini: Store release announcement. Low views — product update format does not work on TikTok. Wrong hook type for the platform.
column29: Kill — product update format fails on TikTok. Convert milestone content to a founder-story or /shape testimonial ask instead.

ContentTitle: Are You Learning or Just Getting Answers?
Hook: AI summarizes your research papers — but are you still learning?
CoreMessage: AI shortcuts bypass the understanding you actually need. Are you trading speed for depth?
Notes_Gemini: 2 comments on 30 views = highest comment-to-view ratio in the set. Topic resonates strongly with a specific audience.
column29: Investigate — read both comments before deciding. This topic may be the seed of a Substack angle or a longer-form LinkedIn post.

Hook: Prometheus gave humans fire — AI is giving you faster answers. But is that what you need?
CoreMessage: Faster answers vs deeper understanding. Don't outsource your mind.
Notes_Gemini: Lowest performer. Philosophical metaphor hook fails on TikTok. Prometheus is too abstract for 7-second hook format.
column29: Kill — reframe as LinkedIn long-form essay or Substack. Wrong platform for this level of abstraction.
